description: Troubleshoot connection issues for the 'Finance' team at the Jitsi meeting room 'FinanceTroubleshoot' (http://localhost:8080/FinanceTroubleshoot). Capture the browser console logs from the initialization sequence and save them to /home/ga/jitsi_debug.log. Save a screenshot showing the console logs alongside the meeting window to /home/ga/console_evidence.png.
